prose:
The primary efficacy endpoint was evaluated at the specified timepoint. The treatment showed improvement compared to placebo.

Results were analyzed using appropriate statistical methods. The drug group showed reductions in the primary endpoint compared to the control group. Statistical significance was achieved in the analysis.

The results demonstrated that the investigational drug was effective in treating the condition. Further details on the specific numerical results are presented in the accompanying data tables. [PLACEHOLDER: Insert LS mean treatment differences and confidence intervals from Table 14.2.1]
